formulas.name: JanForecastFormula
formulas.expression: IF(AND(YEAR($Record.ProjectStart__c) <= YEAR(TODAY()), 1 >= MONTH($Record.ProjectStart__c), OR(1 <= MONTH($Record.ProjectEnd__c), YEAR($Record.ProjectEnd__c) > YEAR(TODAY())), YEAR($Record.ProjectEnd__c) >= YEAR(TODAY())), ($Record.Amount - $Record.ILVForecast__c - $Record.SupplierCostsForecast__c) * $Record.Probability / 100 / $Record.ProjectDurationMonths__c, 0)

formulas.name: FebForecastFormula
formulas.expression: IF(AND(YEAR($Record.ProjectStart__c) <= YEAR(TODAY()), 2 >= MONTH($Record.ProjectStart__c), OR(2 <= MONTH($Record.ProjectEnd__c), YEAR($Record.ProjectEnd__c) > YEAR(TODAY())), YEAR($Record.ProjectEnd__c) >= YEAR(TODAY())), ($Record.Amount - $Record.ILVForecast__c - $Record.SupplierCostsForecast__c) * $Record.Probability / 100 / $Record.ProjectDurationMonths__c, 0)

formulas.name: MarForecastFormula
formulas.expression: IF(AND(YEAR($Record.ProjectStart__c) <= YEAR(TODAY()), 3 >= MONTH($Record.ProjectStart__c), OR(3 <= MONTH($Record.ProjectEnd__c), YEAR($Record.ProjectEnd__c) > YEAR(TODAY())), YEAR($Record.ProjectEnd__c) >= YEAR(TODAY())), ($Record.Amount - $Record.ILVForecast__c - $Record.SupplierCostsForecast__c) * $Record.Probability / 100 / $Record.ProjectDurationMonths__c, 0)

formulas.name: AprForecastFormula
formulas.expression: IF(AND(YEAR($Record.ProjectStart__c) <= YEAR(TODAY()), 4 >= MONTH($Record.ProjectStart__c), OR(4 <= MONTH($Record.ProjectEnd__c), YEAR($Record.ProjectEnd__c) > YEAR(TODAY())), YEAR($Record.ProjectEnd__c) >= YEAR(TODAY())), ($Record.Amount - $Record.ILVForecast__c - $Record.SupplierCostsForecast__c) * $Record.Probability / 100 / $Record.ProjectDurationMonths__c, 0)

formulas.name: MayForecastFormula
formulas.expression: IF(AND(YEAR($Record.ProjectStart__c) <= YEAR(TODAY()), 5 >= MONTH($Record.ProjectStart__c), OR(5 <= MONTH($Record.ProjectEnd__c), YEAR($Record.ProjectEnd__c) > YEAR(TODAY())), YEAR($Record.ProjectEnd__c) >= YEAR(TODAY())), ($Record.Amount - $Record.ILVForecast__c - $Record.SupplierCostsForecast__c) * $Record.Probability / 100 / $Record.ProjectDurationMonths__c, 0)

formulas.name: JunForecastFormula
formulas.expression: IF(AND(YEAR($Record.ProjectStart__c) <= YEAR(TODAY()), 6 >= MONTH($Record.ProjectStart__c), OR(6 <= MONTH($Record.ProjectEnd__c), YEAR($Record.ProjectEnd__c) > YEAR(TODAY())), YEAR($Record.ProjectEnd__c) >= YEAR(TODAY())), ($Record.Amount - $Record.ILVForecast__c - $Record.SupplierCostsForecast__c) * $Record.Probability / 100 / $Record.ProjectDurationMonths__c, 0)

formulas.name: JulForecastFormula
formulas.expression: IF(AND(YEAR($Record.ProjectStart__c) <= YEAR(TODAY()), 7 >= MONTH($Record.ProjectStart__c), OR(7 <= MONTH($Record.ProjectEnd__c), YEAR($Record.ProjectEnd__c) > YEAR(TODAY())), YEAR($Record.ProjectEnd__c) >= YEAR(TODAY())), ($Record.Amount - $Record.ILVForecast__c - $Record.SupplierCostsForecast__c) * $Record.Probability / 100 / $Record.ProjectDurationMonths__c, 0)

formulas.name: AugForecastFormula
formulas.expression: IF(AND(YEAR($Record.ProjectStart__c) <= YEAR(TODAY()), 8 >= MONTH($Record.ProjectStart__c), OR(8 <= MONTH($Record.ProjectEnd__c), YEAR($Record.ProjectEnd__c) > YEAR(TODAY())), YEAR($Record.ProjectEnd__c) >= YEAR(TODAY())), ($Record.Amount - $Record.ILVForecast__c - $Record.SupplierCostsForecast__c) * $Record.Probability / 100 / $Record.ProjectDurationMonths__c, 0)

formulas.name: SepForecastFormula
formulas.expression: IF(AND(YEAR($Record.ProjectStart__c) <= YEAR(TODAY()), 9 >= MONTH($Record.ProjectStart__c), OR(9 <= MONTH($Record.ProjectEnd__c), YEAR($Record.ProjectEnd__c) > YEAR(TODAY())), YEAR($Record.ProjectEnd__c) >= YEAR(TODAY())), ($Record.Amount - $Record.ILVForecast__c - $Record.SupplierCostsForecast__c) * $Record.Probability / 100 / $Record.ProjectDurationMonths__c, 0)

formulas.name: OctForecastFormula
formulas.expression: IF(AND(YEAR($Record.ProjectStart__c) <= YEAR(TODAY()), 10 >= MONTH($Record.ProjectStart__c), OR(10 <= MONTH($Record.ProjectEnd__c), YEAR($Record.ProjectEnd__c) > YEAR(TODAY())), YEAR($Record.ProjectEnd__c) >= YEAR(TODAY())), ($Record.Amount - $Record.ILVForecast__c - $Record.SupplierCostsForecast__c) * $Record.Probability / 100 / $Record.ProjectDurationMonths__c, 0)

formulas.name: NovForecastFormula
formulas.expression: IF(AND(YEAR($Record.ProjectStart__c) <= YEAR(TODAY()), 11 >= MONTH($Record.ProjectStart__c), OR(11 <= MONTH($Record.ProjectEnd__c), YEAR($Record.ProjectEnd__c) > YEAR(TODAY())), YEAR($Record.ProjectEnd__c) >= YEAR(TODAY())), ($Record.Amount - $Record.ILVForecast__c - $Record.SupplierCostsForecast__c) * $Record.Probability / 100 / $Record.ProjectDurationMonths__c, 0)

formulas.name: DecForecastFormula
formulas.expression: IF(AND(YEAR($Record.ProjectStart__c) <= YEAR(TODAY()), 12 >= MONTH($Record.ProjectStart__c), OR(12 <= MONTH($Record.ProjectEnd__c), YEAR($Record.ProjectEnd__c) > YEAR(TODAY())), YEAR($Record.ProjectEnd__c) >= YEAR(TODAY())), ($Record.Amount - $Record.ILVForecast__c - $Record.SupplierCostsForecast__c) * $Record.Probability / 100 / $Record.ProjectDurationMonths__c, 0)

formulas.name: JanNextYearForecastFormula
formulas.expression: IF(AND(1 <= MONTH($Record.ProjectEnd__c), YEAR($Record.ProjectEnd__c) > YEAR(TODAY()), OR(AND(1 >= MONTH($Record.ProjectStart__c), YEAR($Record.ProjectEnd__c) = YEAR(TODAY())+1), YEAR($Record.ProjectStart__c) <= YEAR(TODAY()))), ($Record.Amount - $Record.ILVForecast__c - $Record.SupplierCostsForecast__c) * $Record.Probability / 100 / $Record.ProjectDurationMonths__c, 0)

formulas.name: FebNextYearForecastFormula
formulas.expression: IF(AND(2 <= MONTH($Record.ProjectEnd__c), YEAR($Record.ProjectEnd__c) > YEAR(TODAY()), OR(AND(2 >= MONTH($Record.ProjectStart__c), YEAR($Record.ProjectEnd__c) = YEAR(TODAY())+1), YEAR($Record.ProjectStart__c) <= YEAR(TODAY()))), ($Record.Amount - $Record.ILVForecast__c - $Record.SupplierCostsForecast__c) * $Record.Probability / 100 / $Record.ProjectDurationMonths__c, 0)

formulas.name: MarNextYearForecastFormula
formulas.expression: IF(AND(3 <= MONTH($Record.ProjectEnd__c), YEAR($Record.ProjectEnd__c) > YEAR(TODAY()), OR(AND(3 >= MONTH($Record.ProjectStart__c), YEAR($Record.ProjectEnd__c) = YEAR(TODAY())+1), YEAR($Record.ProjectStart__c) <= YEAR(TODAY()))), ($Record.Amount - $Record.ILVForecast__c - $Record.SupplierCostsForecast__c) * $Record.Probability / 100 / $Record.ProjectDurationMonths__c, 0)
